summary: Attempted frontend-only verification of (a) LocationMap on Car Rental Details, (b) editable search-summary card + ViewModeToggle on Car Rental Results, (c) richer Add Car modal, and (d) ViewModeToggle rollout on the five management pages + Admin Users. Testing was severely blocked by aggressive HTTP 429 rate-limiting on the preview URL (cinema-management-p0.preview.emergentagent.com): after ~3 login attempts, all asset/API requests started returning 429 and the React shell rendered blank (document.body.innerText length = 0). I waited up to 90s between retries and even so the rate limit recurred. Customer login flow works (two-step: email -> Continue -> password -> Submit lands on /dashboard) and /services/car-rental (CarRentalSearch) renders the 'Rent a Car' form correctly when not throttled. I could not reach /services/car-rental/results, /services/car-rental/details/:id, /services/car-rental/booking, or any management page without the preview returning 429s and a blank shell. No JavaScript runtime errors were captured by pageerror listener — only 429 console errors — so the white screen appears to be the result of failed JS chunk delivery rather than a code bug. ESLint flags blocking 'react-hooks/immutability' / 'set-state-in-effect' / 'purity' warnings in CarRentalResults.jsx (lines 228, 277) and CarRentalDetails.jsx (lines 44, 127, 147) that the main agent should review.

integration_issues.issue: Aggressive 429 rate-limiting on the preview hostname makes automated frontend verification effectively impossible right now; even simple loads of /services/car-rental after login return a fully blank shell (body.innerText length = 0). This may also impact real user testing.

verified_flows: Login works (two-step email -> Continue -> password -> Submit) for customer@test.com
/services/car-rental (CarRentalSearch) renders the Rent a Car hero + form correctly (visible in cr_list.png)
unverified_due_to_environment: CarRentalResults — view-mode-toggle visibility, default 'list' mode, blue gradient search-summary card, Edit/Apply/Cancel inputs

CarRentalDetails — LocationMap (data-testid='location-map'), 'View in Google Maps >' link, 'Customer reviews' card, 'No reviews yet' empty state, em-dash rating badge, Final Step -> /services/car-rental/booking navigation
Add Car modal extended fields persistence
action_items: Re-run this test pass after preview rate-limit window clears, OR test against an environment that is not behind the 429 throttle.

Investigate why /services/car-rental and /services/car-rental/results render a fully blank body (no shell chrome) when the preview returns 429 — consider adding an ErrorBoundary / offline-shell fallback so users don't see a white screen on transient asset failures.

Address ESLint blocking warnings: CarRentalResults.jsx L228 (set-state-in-effect on [pickupLocation,pickupDate,returnDate]) and L277 (mutating spread); CarRentalDetails.jsx L44 (useState during render purity), L127 (try/catch mutation pattern), L147 (totalPrice mutation) — these are flagged as Errors by the local lint config.
critical_code_review_comments: LocationMap.jsx: marker icon patch is global+idempotent — good. Falls back to MapPin icon when lat/lon missing — matches spec.
ViewModeToggle.jsx: data-testid attributes look correct (view-mode-toggle, view-mode-list/grid/details).

CarRentalResults.jsx (532 lines): uses correct URL params (pickup, pickupDate, returnDate) — note review_request example incorrectly uses pickup_location/pickup_date which won't populate the summary card if anyone follows that as docs.
CarRentalDetails.jsx (493 lines): trending toward the 700-line ceiling — consider splitting Map+Reviews into sub-components.

success_rate.frontend: 10% — only login + CarRentalSearch shell verified; all rollout/map/reviews/modal checks blocked by 429

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login is two-step: click 'Login to Your Account' on welcome -> fill email -> click 'Continue' -> fill password -> click submit button. Use URL params pickup / pickupDate / returnDate for CarRentalResults. Rate limiting on the preview returned 429s in batches of 50+ requests during this session; wait ~90s between heavier flows. When throttled the React shell rendered fully blank (no sidebar) which itself is a soft bug worth fixing with an ErrorBoundary.
rca of the issue: The white-screen observation on /services/car-rental and /services/car-rental/results is correlated with the preview server returning HTTP 429 for static asset / API requests (50+ consecutive 429s captured). No JS pageerror or runtime exception was emitted, so the most likely cause is that one or more chunked JS bundles (e.g. the lazy-loaded CarRentalResults chunk) failed to download due to throttling, leaving React unable to mount the route. Mitigation: (1) add an ErrorBoundary at the route level with a friendly retry UI; (2) ensure lazy chunks have a retry-on-network-failure wrapper; (3) re-run frontend testing once the preview rate-limit cools down or against a non-throttled environment.
